description: This new cafe in Himayatnagar is being frequented by youngsters and families for its earthy decor, great coffees and food. We like that people coming in from far away parts of Hyderabad, like Dilsukhnagar and beyond, have a spot to hang out without travelling too much. Timing: 11 AM - 11 PM
search_query: Hyderabad cafes where startup people hang out
title: 27 New Cafes In Hyderabad That You Must Visit For A Group Hang
